text.title: Vision Applications — Worked Examples
text.summary: Two worked calls: document extraction of a receipt and moderation of a user upload with severity normalization + review routing.

section.title: Moderation with severity normalization + review routing

example.code:
import json from openai import OpenAI
POLICY = ["violence","adult_content","hate_symbols","self_harm","illegal_activity"]
def moderate(image_url): prompt = (f"Analyse for policy violations: {', '.join(POLICY)}. " 'Return JSON {"is_safe": bool, "flags": [str], "severity": "none|low|medium|high",' ' "confidence": 0-1, "reasoning": str}') resp = OpenAI().chat.completions.create(model="gpt-4o", response_format={"type":"json_object"}, messages=[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":prompt}, {"type":"image_url","image_url":{"url": image_url, "detail":"auto"}}]}]) raw = json.loads(resp.choices[0].message.content) raw["severity"] = str(raw.get("severity","none")).strip().lower() if raw["severity"] not in {"none","low","medium","high"}: raw["severity"] = "low" conf = float(raw.get("confidence", 0)) needs_review = conf < 0.7 or raw["severity"] in {"medium","high"} out = {"status":"ok","task":"moderate","is_safe": bool(raw.get("is_safe")), "flags": list(raw.get("flags",[])), "severity": raw["severity"], "confidence": conf, "needs_human_review": needs_review, "provider":"openai","model":"gpt-4o", "cache_key":"a"*64, "cached":False} return out
result = moderate("https://example.com/uploaded.jpg") if result["needs_human_review"]: # write to review queue, do NOT auto-hide pass print(json.dumps(result, indent=2))
